properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration-ms
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: auth.rate-limit.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum failed login attempts allowed per window.

properties.name: auth.rate-limit.window-seconds
properties.description: Rate limit window size in seconds.
